Lady Alice Norreys (previously Dame Alice Norreys; c. 1405 – c. 1450) was an English Lady of the Most Noble Order of the Garter.

zh.Yattendon Manor, Berkshire, England: 英國英格蘭波克夏亞頓登
zh.Coleshill, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Merbrooke於1405年出生在英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon29歲，母親Helena de Montfort33歲。她於1425年與Sir John Norreys在英國波克夏布雷結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在英國波克夏布雷享年45歲，埋葬在英國波克夏布雷。

zh-hans.Coleshill, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Merbrooke于1405年出生在英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon29岁，母亲Helena de Montfort33岁。她于1425年与Sir John Norreys在英国波克夏布雷结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在英国波克夏布雷享年45岁，埋葬在英国波克夏布雷。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Merbrooke was born in 1405, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon, was 29 and her mother, Helena de Montfort, was 33. She married Sir John Norreys in 1425, in Bray, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1450, in Bray, Berkshire, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Bray, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Merbrooke est née en 1405, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Helena de Montfort, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Norreys en 1425, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Bray, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Merbrooke 1405 in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon 29 und ihre Mutter Helena de Montfort 33. Sie hat 1425 in Bray, Berkshire, England Sir John Norreys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Bray, Berkshire, England und wurde in Bray, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Merbrooke è nata il nel 1405 nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Helena de Montfort, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Norreys nel 1425, nel Bray, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel Bray, Berkshire, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Bray, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Merbrookeが1405年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendonは29歳，母Helena de Montfortは33歳であった。1425年にイギリスバークシュアイアブレイでSir John Norreysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にイギリスバークシュアイアブレイで45歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアブレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Merbrooke(이)가 1405년 영국 워윅실르 콜레시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena de Montfort(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 버크실르 브라이에서 Sir John Norreys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 영국 버크실르 브라이에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 브라이에 묻혔다.

mn.Yattendon Manor, Berkshire, England: Yattendon, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Merbrooke nasceu em 1405, em Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Helena de Montfort, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Norreys em 1425, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Merbrooke родилась в 1405 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena de Montfort, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Norreys в 1425 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности брэи, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Merbrooke nació en 1405, en Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Merbrooke Lord Of Yattendon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Helena de Montfort, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir John Norreys en 1425, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1450, en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Bray, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
